_schema: jig dimension spread v0 (rubric-v1.5). Per-dimension fleet score spread — p25, median, p75 — surfaced beside each `jig check` dimension score so a reader can see which dimensions separate servers and which do not. Derived from data/census2-calibration.json; values rounded to 1 decimal. This is NOT data/percentiles.json: that file holds context-token samples on the curated v1 cohort and drives scoring, while this file is reporting context only and never enters the composite.
_caveat: One machine, one run: the fleet includes unvetted npm-pool additions, and the reachable subset skews toward the curated v1 cohort, so these spreads describe the sampled fleet rather than the ecosystem.
